acute-radiation-syndrome.source_ref: literature-validated (2026-05-26): Kim & Cucinotta 2009 (Health Phys 97(1):68-81) ~90% SPEs medically inconsequential → supports Beta-Bernoulli p≈0.10; Carnell 2016 NASA/TM-20160003870 ARS risk assessment; Hu 2020 Life Sci Space Res biomathematical models; Kennedy 2014 NSBRI CARR; Cliver 2016 Carrington return period ~90 yrs. Beta-Bernoulli α=2,β=18 retained — consistent with IMM architecture (K15) and literature. ISS zero-ARS (Crucian 2016, 20.57 flight-years) applies only to LEO magnetosphere-protected missions; deep-space risk per SPE is ~10% for E>30 MeV events. rev3-f (2026-05-26): severity tuned against persistent-impairment literature — treated mean=0.495, n_treated=6, n_untreated=1

smoke-inhalation.source_ref: PyMC NUTS posterior fit (2026-05-26) against Guibaud 2022 (Acta Astronautica) spacecraft fire incident catalog: 6 events / 74164 person-days (Mir 1997 only medically significant event in ~60 yrs crewed flight; ISS era 0/54750). Prior Gamma(2,500k) updated to posterior Gamma(7.76,557369), mean λ=1.39e-5. R-hat=1.000, ESS=3765. rev3-f (2026-05-26): severity tuned against persistent-impairment literature — treated mean=0.514, n_treated=5, n_untreated=1

global_calibration.fit_against: K15 Table 1 (ISS 6mo/6crew); A22 4-step trial verbatim; M18 σ<5% convergence; TM21 AMM/SMM

antarctic-station._doc_: 2026-06-04 Antarctic vs controlled-habitat context modulation. Anchored on research/analog_incidence_antarctic.md (Bhatia 2012 Maitri 26-PY; Palinkas 2004 313 US winter-overs; Pattarini 2016 USAP 3 stations; Hong 2022 Korean 88 winter-overs; Peřina 2024 multi-station dental; Nirwan 2022 SP altitude). Multiplier of 1.0 = no change. Applied AFTER tier multiplier, BEFORE risk-factor / Stage-A multipliers. Source_ref: research/evidence_extracted/antarctic_kind_multipliers.md (forthcoming).

analog-controlled._doc_: 2026-06-04 controlled-habitat context modulation. Heated, climate-stable, real-time medical support. Most conditions at base-rate; URTI / depression modestly suppressed (no McMurdo Crud reservoir, shorter durations). Space-adaptation / ECLSS-specific conditions set to 0 (no microgravity, no CO2 scrubber failure modes).
